summary: Backend refactoring verification complete. All extracted routes (Loyalty, Discount, Abandoned Cart) are working correctly after extraction from monolithic server.py. 18/18 tests passed.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/loyalty/balance?user_id=dipali@clubconcierge.in - Returns loyalty balance with points, tier, multiplier
GET /api/admin/loyalty/stats - Returns program statistics (admin auth required)
GET /api/admin/discount-codes - Returns all discount codes (admin auth required)
POST /api/cart/snapshot - Saves cart snapshot with session_id, items, subtotal
POST /api/cart/capture-email - Captures email for abandoned cart recovery
GET /api/admin/abandoned-carts - Returns all abandoned carts with stats

features_verified.evidence: All admin endpoints correctly require HTTP Basic Auth with credentials aditya:lola4304
Full cart flow tested: snapshot -> email capture -> admin visibility -> convert

critical_code_review_comments: All extracted routes properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses using {'_id': 0} projection
Database injection pattern (set_database function) is consistent across all extracted files
Admin authentication is properly implemented using HTTPBasic with secrets.compare_digest
File sizes are reasonable: loyalty_routes.py (249 lines), discount_routes.py (204 lines), cart_routes.py (676 lines)
seed_data_creation: Test carts created during testing (auto-cleaned via convert flow)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring complete. Routes extracted from server.py: loyalty_routes.py, discount_routes.py, cart_routes.py. All endpoints verified working. Server.py reduced to 10,210 lines. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_extracted_routes.py for regression testing.
